goals: Explore the workspace to discover what files and directories are available
Find files related to trails, parks, or nature in Boone
Read the contents of relevant trail or park information files
Create a new file to save favorite trail recommendations or notes

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and methodical explorer who enjoys discovering new trails and organizing outdoor experiences. Prefers practical, hands-on exploration over abstract planning.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows nothing about workspace tools or file operations. Understands trail systems and outdoor recreation in Boone but has no technical expertise.

end_condition: The user has explored the workspace, found relevant trail or park information, read the contents, and created a personal file with trail notes or recommendations.
